sections.content:
Interesting! When I clicked on the B-box area:
1. Row 31: `NBN` → `NWN` - The B-box center changed from B (black) to W (white)!
2. Row 34: `NWN` → `NcN` - The W-box center changed from W (white) to c (charcoal)!
So clicking on the B-box swapped the colors of the two boxes! The W-box center became charcoal, and the B-box center became white. This is a color swap mechanic.
Now the B-box has a white center (matching the charcoal box interior), and the W-box has a charcoal center (not matching). This seems backwards from what I want.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the goal is:
1. The W-box (white center) should go into the left charcoal box (white interior) - DONE
2. The B-box (black center) should go into the right charcoal box (white interior) - but the colors don't match
Or maybe the goal is to have both boxes inside their respective charcoal boxes, regardless of color matching. The W-box is already inside the left charcoal box. I need to get the B-box inside the right charcoal box.
But I just swapped the colors. Let me swap them back by clicking on the W-box again.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider. Maybe the goal is to have the boxes with matching colors inside the charcoal boxes. The left charcoal box has a white interior, so the box with the white center should go there. The right charcoal box also has a white interior, so the box with the white center should go there too. But there's only one box with a white center.
Hmm, maybe the goal is different. Let me think about what the B-box represents. The B-box has a black center, and the right charcoal box has a white interior. Maybe the B-box is supposed to "fill" the charcoal box with black?
Actually, let me re-examine the right panel. Looking at the ASCII:
```
30: pwwwNNNccccwww
31: pwwwNWNwwwwwww
32: pwwwNNNwwwwwww
```
The B-box (now with W center after the swap) is at rows 30-32, cols 42-44. The right charcoal box is at rows 26-30, cols 44-48. The B-box is below and to the left of the charcoal box.
Wait, I need to swap the colors back. Let me click on the W-box (now with charcoal center) to swap back.
